have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by contrapose! h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h5 : 1 / (1 - t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    refine' ⟨⟨ht1, h5, h4⟩, _, _⟩
    · field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
    · field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
  have h_inf : Set.Infinite { (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t) | t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 } := by
    apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem
    · intro t
      exact (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)
    · intro t1 t2 h
      simp only [Prod.mk.inj_iff] at h
      exact h.1
    · intro t
      exact ⟨t, ⟨by aesop, by aesop⟩, rfl⟩
  have h_subset : { (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t) | t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 } ⊆
    { (x, y, z) |
      (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
      (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
      (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
      (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
    rintro _ ⟨t, ⟨ht0, ht1⟩, rfl⟩
    exact h t ht0 ht1
  exact Set.Infinite.mono h_subset h_inf

apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem Nat.cast_injective
  intro n
  use (n + 2 : ℚ), (-(n + 1) : ℚ), (1 / (-(n + 1) * (n + 2)) : ℚ)
  constructor
  · constructor
    · norm_num
    · constructor
      · norm_num
      · intro h
        field_simp at h
        nlinarith
  · constructor
    · field_simp
      ring
    · field_simp
      ring_nf
      <;> norm_num

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / t
    let z := 1
    x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1 ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    simp_all
    <;> field_simp [ht0, sub_ne_zero.mpr ht1]
    <;> ring
  apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun t => (t, 1/t, 1))
  · intro t1 t2 h
    simpa using h
  · intro t
    have ht0 : t ≠ 0 := by
      rintro rfl
      norm_num at t
    have ht1 : t ≠ 1 := by
      rintro rfl
      norm_num at t
    exact h t ht0 ht1

  intro n

  intro n
  use (n + 2 : ℚ), (-(n + 1) : ℚ), (1 / ((n + 2) * (-(n + 1))) : ℚ)

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → (t, 1/t, 1) ∈ { (x, y, z) |
      (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
      (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
      (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
      (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    simp only [Prod.mk.inj_iff]
    refine' ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num, by norm_num⟩
    · norm_num
    · field_simp [ht0, ht1, sub_ne_zero.mpr ht1]
      ring_nf
  exact Set.Infinite.of_injective (fun t => (t, 1/t, 1)) (fun a b h => by simpa using h) (by
    apply Infinite.of_injective (fun t : { t : ℚ // t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 } => t.val)
    intro a b h
    simpa using h)

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by contrapose! h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h5 : 1 / (1 - t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    refine' ⟨⟨h1, h5, h4⟩, _, _⟩
    · field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
    · field_simp [h2, h3, sub_eq_zero, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg]
      ring
  have h_inj : Function.Injective (fun t : ℚ => (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)) := by
    intro t1 t2 h
    simp only [Prod.mk.inj_iff] at h
    exact h.1
  have h_inf : Set.Infinite { t : ℚ | t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 } := by
    apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun t => t) (fun _ => True.intro)
    exact fun t => by simp
  exact Set.Infinite.of_injective (fun t => (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)) h_inj
    (Set.Infinite.mono (fun t ht => h t ht.1 ht.2) h_inf)

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1 ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h1; linarith
    have h5 : (1 / (1 - t)) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      apply h1
      linarith
    have h6 : ((t - 1) / t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      apply h4
      linarith
    constructor
    · exact ⟨h1, h5, h6⟩
    constructor
    · field_simp [h2, h3, h4]
      ring
    · field_simp [h1, h2, h3, h4]
      ring
  have h' : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t) ∈ { (x, y, z) |
      (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
      (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
      (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
      (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    exact h t ht0 ht1
  have h'' : Set.Infinite { t : ℚ | t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 } := by
    apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun n : ℕ => (n + 2 : ℚ))
    · intro n m h
      simpa using h
    · intro n
      exact ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num⟩
  exact Set.Infinite.of_injective (fun t => (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)) (by
    intro t1 t2 h
    simp_all) h''

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1 ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by contrapose! h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h4
      field_simp at h4
      linarith
    have h5 : 1 / (1 - t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h5
      field_simp at h5
      linarith
    have h6 : x * y * z = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
    have h7 : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3, sub_eq_zero, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg] at *
      ring
    exact ⟨by assumption, h5, h4, h6, h7⟩
  have h_inj : Function.Injective (fun t : ℚ => (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)) := by
    intro t1 t2 h_eq
    cases' h_eq with h1 h2
    cases' h2 with h2 h3
    exact h1
  have h_inf : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun t : ℚ => (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)) := by
    apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem
    · exact h_inj
    · intro t
      have ht0 : t ≠ 0 ∨ t = 0 := by apply Classical.em
      have ht1 : t ≠ 1 ∨ t = 1 := by apply Classical.em
      cases' ht0 with ht0 ht0 <;> cases' ht1 with ht1 ht1 <;> 
        try { exact (h t ht0 ht1).2.2.2.2 }
      · exfalso; simp_all
      · exfalso; simp_all
  exact Set.Infinite.mono (by
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨t, rfl⟩ := hx
    have ht0 : t ≠ 0 ∨ t = 0 := by apply Classical.em
    have ht1 : t ≠ 1 ∨ t = 1 := by apply Classical.em
    cases' ht0 with ht0 ht0 <;> cases' ht1 with ht1 ht1 <;> 
      try { exact (h t ht0 ht1).2.2.2.2 }
    · exfalso; simp_all
    · exfalso; simp_all) h_inf

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → (t, 1/t, 1) ∉ { (x, y, z) | x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1 ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ x^2/(x-1)^2 + y^2/(y-1)^2 + z^2/(z-1)^2 = 1 } := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    simp [ht0, ht1]
  refine' Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem _ _
  · exact fun n => (n + 2, 1 / (n + 2), 1)
  · intro m n hmn
    simp_all
  · intro n
    have h1 : (n + 2 : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      have : (n : ℚ) = -1 := by linarith
      exact absurd this (by norm_cast; linarith)
    have h2 : (1 / (n + 2) : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      have : (n : ℚ) = -1 := by field_simp at h; linarith
      exact absurd this (by norm_cast; linarith)
    have h3 : (1 : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
      contradiction
    have h4 : (n + 2) * (1 / (n + 2)) * 1 = 1 := by
      field_simp
    have h5 : (n + 2) ^ 2 / (n + 2 - 1) ^ 2 + (1 / (n + 2)) ^ 2 / (1 / (n + 2) - 1) ^ 2 + 1 ^ 2 / (1 - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      field_simp
      ring_nf
    exact ⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 →

    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by contrapose! h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h5 : 1 / (1 - t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h6 : x * y * z = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp
      ring
    have h7 : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp
      ring
    exact ⟨⟨h1, h5, h4⟩, h6, h7⟩
  refine' Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem _ _
  · intro t
    exact (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)
  · intro t1 t2 h
    simp only [Prod.mk.inj_iff] at h
    exact h.1
  · intro t
    have ht0 : t ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      simp_all
    have ht1 : t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      simp_all
    exact (h t ht0 ht1).1

apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem Nat.cast_injective
  intro n
  use (n + 2 : ℚ), (-(n + 1) : ℚ), (1 / (-(n + 1) * (n + 2)) : ℚ)
  constructor
  · constructor
    · norm_num
    · constructor
      · norm_num
      · norm_num
  · constructor
    · field_simp
      ring
    · field_simp
      ring

apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem Nat.cast_injective
  intro n
  use (n + 2 : ℚ), (-(n + 1) : ℚ), (1 / (-(n + 1) * (n + 2)) : ℚ)
  constructor
  · norm_num
  · constructor
    · norm_num
    · field_simp
      ring

apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem Nat.cast_injective
  intro n
  use (n + 2 : ℚ), (-(n + 1) : ℚ), (1 / (-(n + 1) * (n + 2)) : ℚ)
  constructor
  · norm_num
  · constructor
    · field_simp
      ring
    · field_simp
      ring

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by contrapose! h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h5 : 1 / (1 - t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    refine' ⟨⟨h1, h5, h4⟩, _, _⟩
    · field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
    · field_simp [h2, h3, sub_eq_zero, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg]
      ring
  have h_inj : Function.Injective (fun t : ℚ => (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)) := by
    intro t1 t2 h
    simp only [Prod.mk.inj_iff] at h
    exact h.1
  have h_inf : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun t : { t : ℚ // t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 } => 
    (t.val, 1 / (1 - t.val), (t.val - 1) / t.val)) := by
    apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun t => (t.val, 1 / (1 - t.val), (t.val - 1) / t.val))
    · exact h_inj
    · intro t
      exact h t.val t.property.1 t.property.2
  exact Set.Infinite.mono (by
    rintro ⟨x, y, z⟩ ⟨t, ht0, ht1, rfl⟩
    exact h t ht0 ht1) h_inf

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by contrapose! h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h5 : 1 / (1 - t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h6 : x * y * z = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
    have h7 : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3, sub_eq_zero, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg]
      ring
    exact ⟨⟨h1, h5, h4⟩, h6, h7⟩
  have h_inj : Function.Injective (fun t : ℚ => (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)) := by
    intro t1 t2 h
    cases' h with h1 h2
    cases' h2 with h2 h3
    exact h1
  have h_inf : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun t : { t : ℚ // t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 } => (t.val, 1 / (1 - t.val), (t.val - 1) / t.val)) := by
    apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem
    · exact fun t => (h t.val t.property.1 t.property.2).1
    · exact fun t => (h t.val t.property.1 t.property.2).2.1
    · exact fun t => (h t.val t.property.1 t.property.2).2.2
    · exact h_inj
  exact Set.Infinite.mono (by
    rintro x ⟨t, ht, rfl⟩
    exact ⟨(h t.val t.property.1 t.property.2).1, (h t.val t.property.1 t.property.2).2.1, (h t.val t.property.1 t.property.2).2.2⟩) h_inf

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by contrapose! h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h5 : 1 / (1 - t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h6 : x * y * z = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
    have h7 : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3, sub_eq_zero, sub_ne_zero]
      ring
    exact ⟨⟨h1, h5, h4⟩, h6, h7⟩
  have h_inj : Function.Injective (fun t : ℚ => (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)) := by
    intro t1 t2 h
    cases' h with h1 h2
    cases' h2 with h2 h3
    exact h1
  have h_inf : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun t : { t : ℚ // t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 } => (t.val, 1 / (1 - t.val), (t.val - 1) / t.val)) := by
    apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun t => (t.val, 1 / (1 - t.val), (t.val - 1) / t.val))
    exact fun t => h t.prop.1 t.prop.2
    exact h_inj
  exact Set.Infinite.mono (by
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨t, rfl⟩ := hx
    exact h t.prop.1 t.prop.2) h_inf

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1 ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by contrapose! h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h5 : 1 / (1 - t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h6 : x * y * z = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
    have h7 : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3, sub_eq_zero, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg]
      ring
    exact ⟨by assumption, h5, h4, h6, h7⟩
  have h' : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t) ∈ { (x, y, z) | 
      (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
      (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
      (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
      (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    exact h t ht0 ht1
  have h'' : Set.Infinite { (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t) | t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 } := by
    apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem
    · intro t1 t2 h
      simp only [Prod.mk.inj_iff] at h
      exact h.1
    · intro t
      simp
      exact ⟨t, by simp⟩
  exact Set.Infinite.mono (by
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨t, ht, rfl⟩ := hx
    exact h' t ht.1 ht.2) h''

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by contrapose! h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h; field_simp at h; linarith
    have h5 : 1 / (1 - t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h; field_simp at h; linarith
    have h6 : x * y * z = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
    have h7 : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3, sub_eq_zero, sub_ne_zero, Ne.symm h2, Ne.symm h3]
      ring
    exact ⟨⟨h1, h5, h4⟩, h6, h7⟩
  have h_inj : Function.Injective (fun t : ℚ => (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)) := by
    intro t1 t2 h
    cases' h with h1 h2
    cases' h2 with h2 h3
    exact h1
  refine' Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem h_inj fun t =>
    if ht0 : t = 0 then by simp_all
    else if ht1 : t = 1 then by simp_all
    else by
      have ht0' : t ≠ 0 := by rintro rfl; contradiction
      have ht1' : t ≠ 1 := by rintro rfl; contradiction
      exact (h t ht0' ht1').1.1

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by contrapose! h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h4
      field_simp at h4
      linarith
    have h5 : 1 / (1 - t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h5
      field_simp at h5
      linarith
    refine' ⟨⟨h1, h5, h4⟩, _, _⟩
    · field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
    · field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
  have h_inj : Function.Injective (fun t : ℚ => (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)) := by
    intro t1 t2 h_eq
    cases' h_eq with h1 h2
    cases' h2 with h2 h3
    exact h1
  have h_inf : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun t : { t : ℚ // t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 } => (t.val, 1 / (1 - t.val), (t.val - 1) / t.val)) := by
    apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun t => (t.val, 1 / (1 - t.val), (t.val - 1) / t.val))
    · exact h_inj
    · intro t
      exact h t.val t.property.1 t.property.2
  exact Set.Infinite.mono (by
    rintro x ⟨t, ht, rfl⟩
    exact h t ht.1 ht.2) h_inf

apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem Nat.cast_injective
  intro n
  use (n + 2 : ℚ), (-(n + 1) : ℚ), (1 / (-(n + 1) * (n + 2)) : ℚ)
  constructor
  · constructor
    · norm_num
    · constructor
      · norm_num
      · norm_num
  · constructor
    · field_simp
      ring
    · field_simp
      ring

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / t
    let z := 1
    x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1 ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    simp only [one_div, mul_one, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      contradiction
    have h3 : (1 : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
      norm_num
    have h4 : t * (1 / t) * 1 = 1 := by
      field_simp
    have h5 : t ^ 2 / (t - 1) ^ 2 + (1 / t) ^ 2 / (1 / t - 1) ^ 2 + 1 ^ 2 / (1 - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      -- This approach fails because z=1 is not allowed.
      sorry
    exact ⟨h1, h2, by norm_num, h4, by sorry⟩
  -- Instead, use the known equality case: (x, y, z) = (t, t, 1/t^2) for t ≠ 0,1,-1
  have h' : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → t ≠ -1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := t
    let z := 1 / (t * t)
    x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1 ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1 htn1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h3 : 1 / (t * t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      apply htn1
      nlinarith
    have h4 : t * t * (1 / (t * t)) = 1 := by
      field_simp
    have h5 : t ^ 2 / (t - 1) ^ 2 + t ^ 2 / (t - 1) ^ 2 + (1 / (t * t)) ^ 2 / (1 / (t * t) - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      field_simp
      ring_nf
      <;> try { nlinarith }
    exact ⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩
  -- The set of such triples is infinite because there are infinitely many t : ℚ with t ≠ 0,1,-1
  apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun t => (t, t, 1 / (t * t)))
  · intro t1 t2 h
    simp only [Prod.mk.inj_iff] at h
    exact h.1
  · intro t
    have ht0 : t ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      simp_all
    have ht1 : t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      simp_all
    have htn1 : t ≠ -1 := by
      intro h
      simp_all
    exact (h' t ht0 ht1 htn1).2.2.2.2
  · exact infinite_rat

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / (1 - t)
    let z := (t - 1) / t
    (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    have h1 : t ≠ 1 := ht1
    have h2 : 1 - t ≠ 0 := by contrapose! h1; linarith
    have h3 : t ≠ 0 := ht0
    have h4 : (t - 1) / t ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h5 : 1 / (1 - t) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      field_simp at h
      linarith
    have h6 : x * y * z = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
    have h7 : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      simp only [x, y, z]
      field_simp [h2, h3]
      ring
    exact ⟨⟨by assumption, h5, h4⟩, h6, h7⟩
  have h' : Set.Infinite { (x, y, z) | ∃ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 ∧ 
    x = t ∧ y = 1 / (1 - t) ∧ z = (t - 1) / t } := by
    apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem
    · intro t
      exact (t, 1 / (1 - t), (t - 1) / t)
    · intro t1 t2 h
      simp only [Prod.mk.inj_iff] at h
      cases' h with h1 h2
      cases' h2 with h2 h3
      field_simp at h2
      linarith
    · intro t
      have h1 : t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 := by tauto
      exact ⟨t, by tauto⟩
  have h'' : { (x, y, z) | ∃ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 ∧ t ≠ 1 ∧ 
    x = t ∧ y = 1 / (1 - t) ∧ z = (t - 1) / t } ⊆ 
    { (x, y, z) |
      (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
      (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
      (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
      (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
    intro p hp
    rcases hp with ⟨t, ht0, ht1, rfl, rfl, rfl⟩
    exact h t ht0 ht1
  exact Set.Infinite.mono h'' h'

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / t
    let z := 1
    False := by
    intro t ht₀ ht₁
    simp_all
  refine' Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem _ _
  · intro n
    use (n + 2 : ℚ), 1 / (n + 2), 1
    constructor
    · constructor
      · norm_num
      · constructor
        · norm_num
        · norm_num
    · constructor
      · field_simp
      · field_simp
        ring
  · intro n m hnm
    simp_all

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / t
    let z := 1
    x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1 ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ 
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro t ht₀ ht₁
    simp_all
    <;> field_simp [ht₀, ht₁, sub_eq_zero, Ne.symm ht₁]
    <;> ring
  refine' Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem _ _
  · intro t
    exact ⟨t, 1 / t, 1, by simpa using h t (by aesop) (by aesop)⟩
  · intro t₁ t₂ ht
    simpa [Prod.ext_iff] using ht

have h : ∀ t : ℚ, t ≠ 0 → t ≠ 1 → 
    let x := t
    let y := 1 / t
    let z := 1
    (x, y, z) ∈ { (x, y, z) |
      (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
      (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
      (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
      (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } → False
  := by
    intro t ht0 ht1
    intro h_mem
    simp_all
  refine' Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem _ _
  · exact fun t => (t + 1, 1 / (t + 1), 1)
  · intro t
    simp_all
    <;> norm_num
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> field_simp
    <;> ring_nf
  · intro t1 t2 h_eq
    simp_all
